  1. Home
  2. Custom Banners
  3. Standard Size Banners

Standard Size Banners

The Perfect Banner For Any Job

 

  • Product Overview
  • Material Options
  • Finishing Options
  • Artwork Specs
  • Production Times
  • Payment Options
  • Shipping Guidelines

Vinyl banners are printed on high-quality 13oz scrim vinyl banner material. The scrim vinyl is a woven fiber inside the material that gives the banner extra strength. You can use banners indoor and outdoor for many different occasions.

Vinyl banners are digitally-printed in full color. You can select one of our banner templates to customize in the online designer with backgrounds, clip-art and text. You can also upload your own images.

Did we answer all your questions?

If not, please give us a call at (320) 391-5300, and one of our customer service representatives will be more than happy to help you.

Looking for something more specific? We can customize your order through a custom quote! Ideal for special projects, unique sizes, and larger quantity orders.

Six Customizable Banner Materials

Your banner is made with the finest materials available and printed using state-of-the-art, large-format printers for vibrant colors that pop. All banners are manufactured and printed in the USA.

Exact sizes of banners cannot be guaranteed. Vinyl is a temperature-sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing, finishing, and outside climate. Please note our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (ex., a 5' banner could finish with a 2.5" variance). If your banner needs to be precise, please ask your customer service representative to discuss your specific application.

13 oz Matte Vinyl Banners

Our high-quality 13 oz matte vinyl banner material is our most popular banner material. It has a low shine and rich color gamut.
13 oz Gloss Vinyl Banners

Our high-quality 13 oz gloss vinyl banner material has a high shine to it that produces vibrant, crisp colors and graphics to give it a high-end look.
18 oz Vinyl Banners

Our extra heavy-duty matte 18 oz vinyl banner material is our toughest material. It has a low luster, blockout coating for extra durability and print quality. 
Mesh Banners

Made with 8 oz PVC polyester mesh material that has a criss-crossed breathable scrim that allows a 37% airflow. Mesh banners are ideal for outdoor and windy conditions.
Fabric Banners

Made with a premium nylon/polyester blend material called Banner Soft. This fabric is ideal for indoor displays and has a low shine that produces a high-end look and feel.
Adhesive Banners

Standard Tack Vinyl: Standard tack vinyl can be used both indoors and outdoors, with an outdoor lifespan of 3 to 5 years when properly installed and maintained.

Extreme Tack Vinyl: Extreme Tack vinyl is white calendered vinyl material with a high tack adhesive that is specifically designed to adhere to low energy surfaces.

Standard Size Banner Finishing Options

Hems & Grommets Reinforced Hems Reinforced Corners Pole Pockets
These are a one inch fold, heat-welded hem with grommets typically added every 2-4 feet.  A thick, weblike material (similar to what is used in seatbelts) is heat-welded to the perimeter of the banner to provide additional reinforcement. A triangular piece of vinyl is applied to the corners of the banner and secured with grommets to improve both the strength and durability in the corners of the banner. A pocket or sleeve added to the banner to allow for a dowel or pole to run through it for support. When selecting pole pockets, there will be no increase in the finished size of the banner.

Heat Welded Hems & Grommets

Hems consist of one inch of the vinyl banner material folded over to the backside of the banner and heated together to form a clean and strong one-inch hem. We recommend having hems for all banners to increase the strength and durability of the banner.

You will have the following options when selecting hems and grommets for your banners:

Top and Bottom Only Hems - This is our standard finishing option for vinyl banners. The top and bottom of every banner will be heat welded and grommeted. All Four Sides Hems - This is another common finishing option for vinyl banners. All 4 sides of the banner will be heat welded and grommeted.

Pole Pockets

Pole pockets consist of 2 inches, 3 inches, or 4 inches of material wrapped around the sides, top, or bottom of the banner. The vinyl banner material is folded over the backside of the banner similar to hems, but there is room for a pole or rod to go through the pocket.

You will have the following pole pocket finishing options for your banners:

  • 2" Pole Pockets - fits a pole 3/4" in diameter
  • 3" Pole Pockets - fits a pole 1 1/4" in diameter
  • 4" Pole Pockets - fits a pole 1 1/2" in diameter

By selecting pole pockets, there will be no increase in the finished size of your banner. Pole pockets can either be 2", 3", or 4". We don't recommend having any text or images within 3 inches of the edge of the banner when you select pole pockets.

**Pole Pockets are not available with reinforced hems or corners. Reinforced corners are not available on banners under 2 feet in height.

Reinforced Corners

Reinforced corners provide extra strength for the banner. The corners have a reinforced hem and are grommeted to each corner of the banner. You cannot have reinforced corners with pole pockets.

Reinforced Hems

Reinforced hems are a 1 3/16" PVC-coated webbing which increases the strength of the banner. The vinyl banner is cut to size, and the reinforcements are heat-welded to the backside of the banner.

We recommend having reinforced hems and reinforced corners on banners over 32 square feet that will be used outdoors or if the banner will be used in a high-wind environment.

**You can not have reinforced hems with pole pockets.

Double-Sided Banner Finishing

We can finish double-sided banners up to 150 square feet. For anything larger, please contact us. Double-sided banners can only have pole pockets or hems and grommet finishing.

To learn more, visit our vinyl banner finishing options page.

**We do not recommend wind slits in banners, therefore, we do not offer them. For more information as to why, visit our wind slit banners information page.

Artwork Guidelines

The file that prints best is .eps converted to outline. We can also print high resolution .pdf or .jpg files. If you are unsure of the quality of your files, our professional graphic designers will be more than happy to help you.

Artwork/Order Proofs

If you would like to double-check your order for correct information, requesting an order proof will allow you to do that. Your order proof will include a low-resolution image of your artwork and a summary of your order (including pricing), as well as your billing and shipping information. Please note that if you request a proof, we will not send your order into production until you have sent your approval.

Color Match Proof System

If your project is color critical, we recommend using our Color Match Proof System, as this is the best way to ensure the color match for your specific project. For more details, please contact a customer service representative.

Production Time Tables

We provide flexible production time ranges for you to choose from. Because it's important for you to have ultimate control over your order, our production times range from one to five business days. This allows you to make the final decision on when you need your order.

1 Business Day Priority:

Timelines can be tight. That's why we offer this zippy one day turnaround option.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases. Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information.
  • Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

2 Business Days Express:

Have an extra day, but still need your products quickly? The express option is ideal for you!

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases. Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information.
  • Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

3 Business Days Standard:

This is our most popular fast turnaround option. Free and speedy enough for almost any custom order.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases. Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information.
  • Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

5 Business Days Saver:

If you’re not in a rush, then you can save some money by choosing our 5-Days Saver option.

  • Orders received after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases. Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information.
  • Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

Payment

All banners must be paid for prior to being put into production. We accept Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover cards. We also accept checks, which must be received before your order is put into production. For more information on check orders, see this article on our blog.

We will not charge your credit card until you have approved your order.

General Shipping Guidelines

If you have any questions about shipping, please contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 prior to ordering. Unless otherwise specified at the time of ordering, your order will be shipped via UPS Ground. We offer a 1–3 day ground shipment to 90% of the United States.

You will receive a tracking number once your package has been shipped.

Shipping prices are determined by the weight and destination of the package. Additional shipping charges apply to large orders.

After products have been shipped, all shipping company terms and conditions apply for lost or delayed packages. We will not refund the banner cost if UPS or any other shipping company has a delay in your package.

Delays due to natural disasters or anything beyond our control will not result in shipping refunds. If the product is damaged in shipping, the damaged goods must be returned, and then a replacement product will be sent.

Lost packages will be replaced after the shipping company confirms loss. This generally takes 7–10 business days after the initial scheduled delivery.

International shipping Notes:

For international shipments, customers must provide both shipping labels and customs documentation. Currently, we only accept international shipping labels from USPS and UPS. For more details, please contact our customer service team.

Shipping Maps

Vinyl Banners & Mesh Banners

This product is produced in our Minnesota or Las Vegas facilities, whichever is more beneficial to the customer's experience based on customer location and product specifications.

Fabric Banners

This product is made in our Minnesota facility only.

Shipping Methods

We offer the following shipping methods:

Standard ( 3–5 Business Days )
Three Day ( 3 Business Days )
Two Day ( 2 Business Days )
Overnight ( 1 Business Day )
UPS Overnight AM

Economy Shipping

If choosing economy shipping, please add in additional postal information such as P.O. Box in the "Address Two" field on the checkout page to help ensure delivery.

Using economy shipping can also add an additional 5–10 days, depending on where the package is being shipped to.

High-quality, high-resolution, and full-color banners take your event to the next level. At banners.com, we offer all that and more, like quick delivery and outdoor durability. Request a quote and start your design, today.

      More About Standard Size Banners Return to Top

      From 1 to 50 feet long, these banners are completely customizable for any job, operation, or event. These standard size banners are the bread and butter of display ads.

      Choose between three vinyl banner material options: heavy-duty 18-oz vinyl, 13-oz premium matte, or 13-oz premium gloss. 

      The extra heavy-duty 18-oz option offers increased durability and resilience. It is perfect for those who want to display banners outdoors for a long period of time. Our 13-oz options will still provide ample durability indoors and outdoors, though it is not designed for harsh weather. 

      If you intend to use your banner indoors, then we suggest ordering it in the matte finish. We suggest this option because interior lighting tends to glare or glint off of gloss finished banners. However, both finishing options are perfectly suitable for indoor and outdoor use. If you choose to create a custom banner with mesh or fabric material, you will be redirected to the corresponding pages. Some common uses for these banners are personalized church banners, custom school banners, & event banners!

      If you have any questions, feel free to reach out to our customer service team regarding our products or services.

      Three Easy Ways to Order

      Online Designer Create your own design using our online design tool. Customize your standard size banner with background, clipart images, text or upload your own graphics.
      Upload a File Upload your own artwork (.eps, .pdf, .jpg). For more information, check out the Product Info tab above.
      Professional Designer Our team of professional graphic designers are able to create custom banner designs for you.

      Frequently Asked Questions Return to Top

      What are standard size banners?

      Standard size banners are commonly ordered banner dimensions, typically printed on vinyl and available in multiple materials. Sizes can range from smaller banners (like 1' × 1') up to large banners (up to 8' × 50').

      What standard vinyl banner sizes do you offer?

      Standard sizes range from 1' × 1' up to 8' × 50'. Common options include 2' × 4' (24" × 48"), 3' × 5' (36" × 60"), 3' × 6' (36" × 72"), and 4' × 8' (48" × 96").

      What size banner should I choose for my viewing distance?

      As a general rule, increase banner size as viewing distance increases. For close-range messaging, 2' × 4' or 3' × 5' is common; for farther viewing, 3' × 6' or 4' × 8' is often used.

      What material are they made of?

      Standard size banners are available in multiple materials, including 13‑oz premium vinyl (matte or gloss), 18‑oz extra heavy‑duty vinyl, PVC polyester mesh, and polyester fabric. If you’d like help choosing a material, contact our customer service team.

      What’s the best material for outdoor standard-size banners?

      For longer-term outdoor use, 18‑oz extra heavy‑duty vinyl is a top choice for durability. For windy locations, mesh is ideal. For short-term outdoor or indoor use, 13‑oz vinyl is a popular option.

      Matte vs. gloss vinyl: which finish should I pick?

      Matte helps reduce glare under indoor lighting. Gloss can look more vibrant and high-contrast. Both finishes can be used indoors or outdoors—glare and appearance are the main differences.

      What is the thickness of your banners?

      Standard size vinyl banners are available in 13‑oz and 18‑oz options. The 13‑oz vinyl is a popular choice for indoor and outdoor use.

      Do these banners come double-sided?

      Yes. Double‑sided banners are available in 13‑oz gloss, 13‑oz matte, and 18‑oz extra heavy‑duty vinyl. Maximum double-sided print size is 6' × 30'.

      What finishing should I choose: hems and grommets or pole pockets?

      Hems and grommets are the most common and flexible option for general installs. Pole pockets are best when you plan to slide the banner onto a pole or crossbar for a clean presentation.

      How do I install my banner?

      Hems and grommets or pole pockets can be added. If you select grommets, we recommend using ball bungees on all grommets provided to distribute tension for a cleaner hang. Standard grommets are 1/2" in diameter. Pole pockets come in 2", 3", and 4"; avoid placing text or important images within 3" of the banner’s edge when choosing pole pockets.

      Do you have recommended file types and resolution for printing?

      For best results, upload print-ready PDF or EPS files when possible, or a high-resolution JPG. High-quality artwork helps text and logos print cleanly at full size.

      Should I include bleed and a safe area in my design?

      Bleed is not needed on artwork files for banners, but it is always good to have a safe area of at least 2–3 inches to keep important text/logos away from the edges and finishing areas (like grommets or pole pockets) to help avoid trimming or coverage issues.

       

      Why Choose Banners.com?

      Customer Service

      Our customer service is 100% in-house and comprised of friendly, professional graphic designers.

      Fast Turnaround

      Choose between a 1, 2, 3, or 5 day production time to complete your order on your schedule.

       

      Quality Products

      Our products are made with the finest materials available and printed using the latest technology.

      Live Order Tracking

      Track your order, every step of the way, with our proprietary Live Order Tracking system.
